commands.summary: Twelve sidecar contract tests passed: valid rich record, deterministic identity and path, stable canonical serialization, concise omission listing required, rich omission forbidden, present-and-omitted rejected, structured generator required, over-budget as finding not schema failure, staleness verified_current, staleness stale on hash mismatch with drift classification, staleness unverifiable on missing source with zero errors, semantic fields matching the warrant list.
Full repository suite passed with 580 tests.
Repository audit returned ok true with verification_outcome verified_current at commit 4c41f50.

commands.command: python -m pytest (independent clone of github.com/MustafaAksu/ai-lab at 4c41f50)
commands.summary: Cross-environment verification reproduced 580 passing tests, the verified_current audit, and identical md5 checksums for the three new files.

summary: Verified completion of PLAN-20260717-0001 at commit 4c41f50: the compact artifact sidecar contract. ai_lab/documentation/artifact_sidecar.py delivers schema v1, validate_sidecar_record, deterministic identity <source_artifact_id>::<profile>, deterministic path docs/sidecars/<id>.<profile>.json, byte-stable canonical serialization, profiles rich_immediate (token hypothesis 250-500) and concise_second_level (80-200) with non-compliance reported as findings never schema failures, the thirteen warrant semantic fields, structured generator provenance (provider, identity, version), the approved omission rule (rich forbids omission; concise requires every omitted field listed in omitted_fields; present-and-omitted and silent absence rejected), fidelity categories with assessment deferred, and assess_staleness returning the shared three-valued verification_outcome imported from ai_lab/documentation/verification_outcome.py: hash match verified_current, hash mismatch stale with an error drift finding, missing or unreadable source unverifiable with a warn evidence-unavailable finding. docs/self_model/SIDECAR_CONTRACT.md documents regeneration, supersession, deletion semantics and the mandated later separately governed slices. No generation, bulk processing, or context integration was implemented. Twelve new tests cover the warrant fixture cases; the full suite passes with 580 tests; the repository audit reports ok true verified_current. COMP-0031 records unanimous provider recommendations: plan complete, omission rule and structured generator within admitted scope, GAP-0004 close, GAP-0002 keep open. Independent cross-verification: commit 4c41f50 pulled from the public GitHub repository into a separate environment reproduced 580 passing tests, the verified_current audit, and byte-identical file checksums.
